inputs.code:
import subprocess, os
out_file='/opt/ComfyUI/models/unet/Krea2RedMix2.1-8Steps-fp8-scaled-ComfyUI.safetensors'
pid=subprocess.run("pgrep -f 'curl.*3086841'", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
if os.path.exists(out_file):
    s=os.path.getsize(out_file)
    sg=s/1024/1024/1024
    # Check header
    with open(out_file,'rb') as f: h=f.read(20)
    is_safetensors = b'__metadata' in h or b'{' in h[:8]
    log_tail=""
    try:
        log=open('/tmp/redmix_download.log').read().strip().split('\n')
        log_tail=log[-1][-150:]
    except: pass
    return f"PID: {pid or 'done'}\nSize: {sg:.2f} GB / ~12.24 GB ({sg/12.24*100:.1f}%)\nValid safetensors: {is_safetensors}\nHeader: {h}\nLog: {log_tail}"
else:
    return f"file not found, pid={pid}"
